subject: Anthropology
title: Why Anthropology Matters
description: A short lesson to help you apply Why Anthropology Matters.

hook.text: A tech company launched a product that flopped in Asia. An anthropologist could have warned them.

buildup.text: Anthropology teaches us to see the world through others' eyes — crucial in a globalized, diverse world.

discovery.text: It fights ethnocentrism by showing that no culture has a monopoly on truth, beauty, or moral reasoning.

twist.text: From public health to tech design to refugee policy, anthropological insight prevents costly cultural blindness.

climax.text: Anthropology matters because misunderstanding others is expensive, dangerous, and entirely preventable.

punchline.text: Understanding others starts with questioning yourself.

quiz.question: How does anthropology help in the modern world?
options: It prevents cultural misunderstandings in diverse contexts
